assertions.rationale: No KeyManagement.SigningAlgorithms configuration. Missing PS256 signing algorithm setup.

assertions.assertion: Sets DPoP.SupportedDPoPSigningAlgorithms with PS256/PS384/PS512 and ES256/ES384/ES512 algorithms
Sets JwtValidationClockSkew to TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10) as required by FAPI 2.0
Client has RequireDPoP = true AND RequirePushedAuthorization = true
Client uses a JsonWebKey secret (not shared secret) for authentication, consistent with FAPI 2.0 requirement for private_key_jwt or mTLS
assertions.rationale: Client uses a shared secret ("strong_secret".Sha256()) instead of JsonWebKey. FAPI 2.0 requires private_key_jwt or mTLS.
